observe: A door, formalized. Lock it going in. Unlock it coming out. Simple — as long as you remember the second part.
fault: Someone locked this door and walked away. Everyone else is still standing here.
repair: Find the lock. Release it, properly this time.
escape: Lock and unlock cleanly — don't leave anyone stranded outside.

observe: Mutex locks provide mutual exclusion through explicit lock and unlock operations.
fault: A mutex was locked and never released.
repair: Perform the required lock and unlock sequence.
escape: Complete all lock/unlock crossings before time expires.

hints: Every lock needs a matching unlock — check what's still holding the door shut.
